commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch raises plugin-state and Telegram message-cache row caps to 3,000, evicts oldest rows from the namespace being written when the plugin cap is exceeded, updates SDK docs, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +39, Docs 0. Total +56 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source: plugin-state register can now succeed by evicting a current-namespace row, while migration cleanup still trusts a stale in-memory key set before renaming the source. I did not run tests in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: A narrow PR-branch repair can update migration cleanup and add regression coverage without changing the broader row-cap policy.
